title: orthocarpus luteus
intro: Orthocarpus luteus, also known as the yellow mountain lover, is a perennial wildflower native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the root of the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as tinctures and salves, for its medicinal purposes.
